component.name: Mixtapes
component.summary: A modern, Linux-first YouTube Music player

description.p: Mixtapes is a YouTube Music player built with GTK4 and Libadwaita for Linux. Browse your library, search for music, create playlists, and enjoy seamless playback with MPRIS integration, responsive mobile-friendly design, and background playback.
Note: This software is in alpha stage. It is not affiliated with YouTube or Google.
Major feature update with UI changes, history, and more.

ul.li: Complete UI overhaul for better desktop experience and consistent maximum width for the view contents
History implemented
New Avatar icon replaces the hamburger menu
Discord RPC: added more options in the settings to customize appearence
Play Next and Add to Queue options in song context menus, playlist row context menus, and playlist/album header menus
More caching for better performance and responsiveness
Added preferences to change renderer in case of GPU acceleration issues
Added preference to control sidebar position (left/right).
Added preference for folder structure in downloads.
Added ability to search within library
Added ability to change between grid and list view for library
Fixed bug where download would override M3U with incomplete tracklist
Added expanded cover view for large screens
Added refresh to some pages
Smaller fixes

description.p: New app icon, Discord RPC improvements, queue management, and bug fixes.

ul.li: New app icon with proper symbolic and devel variants
Windows ICO now has transparency and all standard resolutions (16-256px)
Discord RPC: fix status display field name (status_display_type) so artist/song shows under username
Discord RPC: configurable status display type (app name, artist, or song title) in preferences
Discord RPC: enable/disable toggle in preferences with connection status indicator
Discord RPC: album name now shown in rich presence instead of repeating song title
Play Next and Add to Queue options in song context menus, playlist row context menus, and playlist/album header menus
Album name displayed in search results alongside artist
Missing album names fetched in background for search results
Refresh Metadata option in song row and expanded player menus
Maybe fixed: playlist background fetch race condition that could cause segfaults

description.p: Discord Rich Presence support and a stack of stability fixes around fast skipping, the queue, and the explore page.

ul.li: Discord Rich Presence: now playing track with album art, small Mixtapes icon, and live progress bar (cross-platform: Linux, macOS, Windows)
Start Radio from any playlist or album via the more menu
Fast-skip stability: spamming next no longer wraps the queue back to the first track
Fix: clicking a song in a playlist could silently play the first track when the click target wasn't found in the queue
Fix: removing a song from the queue now updates the queue panel immediately instead of waiting for the next track change
Fix: rare segfault when switching songs from the queue panel
Fix: volume could snap back to 100% on track change due to a spurious GStreamer notify-volume during pipeline rebuilds
Explore tab now retries automatically on transient network errors at startup and shows a manual retry button if it still fails
Expanded player carousel no longer drags playback back to the first track when songs are skipped rapidly

description.p: This update adds the ability to download songs as local files with all the metadata and offline listening, as well as Charts in the Explore page.
Major feature update with library management, uploads, and performance improvements.

ul.li: Changed versioning scheme for Alpha releases to YYYY-MM-DD.p where p is the patch number
Stream URL caching for instant song replay and pre-caching of surrounding queue songs
Multi-select songs in playlists with bulk actions (add to playlist, remove, play selected)
Sort playlists by title, artist, album, or duration with ascending/descending toggle
Search within playlists now covers all tracks, not just loaded ones
Save and unsave albums and playlists to your library
Saved albums section in the library
Upload songs to YouTube Music
Uploaded music tab with albums, artists, and all-songs view
Delete individual uploaded songs and albums with confirmation
Start radio from any song, artist, or search result
Artist page now shows full videos list, playlists, featured on, and fans might also like sections
YouTube channel support (non-artist channels with playlists and videos)
Read more/show less for long descriptions on album, playlist, and artist pages
Copy link with toast notification across the app
Add to playlist from queue panel and expanded player
Playlist duration calculated from all tracks, not just loaded ones
Background playback - music continues when window is closed, reopen via MPRIS
Volume slider now matches system mixer percentage with bidirectional sync
Fixed volume feedback loop that could freeze the system
Fixed song activation playing wrong track due to expanded player carousel race condition
Fixed queue panel selection issues causing unintended track changes
Responsive cover art sizing with proper desktop and mobile dimensions
Consistent search result row heights
Custom playlist cover upload support fixed
